name: linRunSchedTableNtimes
title: linRunSchedTableNtimes
syntax: long linRunSchedTableNtimes (dword tableIndex, dword numberOfRepetitions, dword onSlotIndex, dword returnToTableIndex);
description: Switches from the current schedule table to another one, runs the table n times and returns to the initial table or to a different table.

parameters.name: tableIndex
parameters.description: Index of the schedule table to be changed to. Value range: 0..n-1, where n is a total number of defined schedule tables

parameters.name: numberOfRepetitons
parameters.description: Number of repetitions of the schedule table.

parameters.name: onSlotIndex
parameters.description: Index of last slot in the current schedule table to be sent before changing to the new schedule table. Default value: -1, make change on reaching the end of current schedule table. Value range: -1..x-1, where x is a total number of slots in the current schedule table.

parameters.name: returnToTableIndex
parameters.description: Default value: -1, return to previous table. Value range: 0..n-1, where n is a total number of defined schedule tables.

return: Index of the current schedule table or -1 if no active schedule table exists and on failure.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
